title: Uber Announces Results for Second Quarter 2023
text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) today announced financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2023. Financial Highlights for Second Quarter 2023 Gross Bookings grew 16% year-over-year (“YoY”) to $33.6 billion, or 18% on a constant currency basis, with Mobility Gross Bookings of $16.7 billion (+25% YoY or +28% YoY constant currency) and Delivery Gross Bookings of $15.6 billion (+12% YoY or +14% YoY constant currency). Trips during the quarter grew 22% YoY.
